insights.headline: Which sessions look likely to need concern follow-up (pre-session features only)?
insights.lede: Holdout ROC-AUC 0.509 vs baseline 0.5. Emotional delta R²=0.471.

prediction_cards.label: ROC-AUC concern flagged
prediction_cards.definition: Holdout ROC-AUC for predicting whether a session will have a concern flag (pre-session features only).

prediction_cards.label: R² emotional delta
prediction_cards.definition: Variance explained for emotional delta outcome on holdout sessions.

prediction_cards.label: GroupKFold ROC-AUC mean
prediction_cards.definition: Cross-validated ROC-AUC with folds grouped by resident so one person does not span train and test.

cause_cards.title: Prior sessions only
cause_cards.body: Features use recordings strictly before each session date—mirrors the notebook leakage guard.
cause_cards.definition: Leakage control: only information from before the session’s date enters the feature vector.
